ai_role: Semiconductor IP for CPUs, edge AI, mobile, and custom compute
tvs_tiebreaker: Strong platform economics can support ownership, but valuation should cap sizing.
technical_timing_rule: Avoid adding when EXTENDED; require valuation or technical pullback for new buys.
rationale: Arm has strong semiconductor IP economics and broad edge/inference relevance, but it is not an absolute AI accelerator chokepoint and often trades with high expectations.
